name: fastfiles
description: A platform for sharing files into rooms with a simple interface.
author: Benjamin Rivas <benjaminrivas500@gmail.com>

scripts.build:app: concurrently --names "server,web"r "npm run build --workspace server" "npm run build --workspace web"
scripts.build: npm run build:domain && npm run build:app
scripts.dev:app: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "domain,app" "npm run dev --workspace domain" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace server" "npm run start --workspace web"
